title: WOS API Error
description: RFC 7807 problem details for non-2xx public WOS REST API responses. Every problem carries a stable WOS error code plus optional structured context.

ProblemTypeUri.description: Dereferenceable URI for the documented error type.

WosErrorCode.description: Stable machine-readable WOS error code from the public API error registry.

Problem.description: RFC 7807 problem details response with WOS-specific machine code and context.

type.description: Dereferenceable URI for the documented error type.

title.description: Short human-readable summary of this problem type.

status.description: HTTP status code generated by the server for this problem.

detail.description: Human-readable detail specific to this occurrence.
examples: No workflow process exists for the requested identifier.

instance.description: URN of the affected WOS resource when a single resource caused the problem. Entity-type enum is shared across the schemas/api/ family via `_common.schema.json` (ADR 0082 D-4).

wosErrorCode.description: Stable machine-readable WOS error code from the public API error registry.
